title: Newport man throws electric motorbike off bridge in police chase after doing wheelies
description: Owen Pendree was sentenced to 12 months and has been banned from driving after his "stupid" actions.
content:
Police chase footage shows the moment a "stupid" disqualified driver was caught pulling wheelies and weaving through Newport city centre traffic before throwing his vehicle into the River Usk.

title: Prince Harry, Meghan and children Archie and Lilibet visit King Charles and Queen Camilla
description: It is the first time the King has seen his grandchildren Archie, seven, and Lilibet, five, in person in more than four years.
content:
The Duke and Duchess of Sussex, along with their children Prince Archie and Princess Lilibet, have visited King Charles and Queen Camilla.

title: George and Fiona Cottrell understood to have been interviewed under caution by Met police
description: Interviews of Farage aide and his mother believed to be part of investigation into donations to Reform UK before 2024 election
content:
Nigel Farage’s aide George Cottrell and his mother, Fiona Cottrell, have been interviewed under criminal caution by Scotland Yard detectives, the Guardian understands.

title: Spain wildfire: Blaze was 'really frightening, unbelievably quick', witnesses say
description: Holidaymakers tell the BBC how they grabbed a change of clothes, bundled into cars and fled the flames and smoke.
content:
At least 12 people have died and 23 others are missing in a wildfire in southern Spain that emergency workers were battling to contain on Friday.

title: England close on 21-1 in reply to India's 285 in Lord's Test
description: England face India in a one-off Women's Test at Lord's - follow live scores, radio commentary, video highlights and updates.
content:

Time for us to say farewell.
